services_section.heading: Precision Fabrication for Every Application

services.body: Skilled workforce and comprehensive material supply — delivered on time to any site across Saudi Arabia.

products.title: Weld Assemblies & Sub-Frames

meta.home_title: Edge Steel KSA — Precision Steel Fabrication
meta.home_desc: Leading steel fabrication company in Saudi Arabia. Structural steel, laser cutting, equipment rental, and manpower supply.

hero.sub: Precision cutting, forming, rolling, galvanizing, and coating — all under one roof. Built for construction, industrial, and infrastructure programmes across Saudi Arabia.

serviceBlocks.title: CNC Fiber Laser Cutting
serviceBlocks.desc: Edge Steel KSA operates high-power fiber laser cutting machines capable of processing mild steel up to 80mm thick and accommodating sheets up to 13 metres in length. Our cutting platform handles industrial components, oversized structural panels, and precision parts — all produced to ±0.1mm tolerance with clean, burr-minimised edges that reduce downstream finishing requirements.

steps.title: File Review & DFM Check
steps.desc: DXF/DWG files assessed for geometry, cut feasibility, and material suitability before production is confirmed.

steps.title: Nesting & Material Optimisation
steps.desc: Parts programmed for maximum yield — minimising scrap and keeping unit costs competitive.

steps.title: Cut, Inspect & Despatch
steps.desc: Edge quality and dimensional accuracy verified against drawing before every order leaves our facility.

serviceBlocks.title: CNC Turret Punching
serviceBlocks.desc: For dense hole patterns, ventilation slots, and formed features in sheet metal, Edge Steel KSA's CNC turret punching lines deliver the speed and repeatability laser cutting alone cannot match. Fitted with MTX multi-tool stations — multiple punch profiles active from a single station — our machines drastically cut setup time and cycle time on medium to high-volume production runs.

steps.title: Punch Layout & Tooling Review
steps.desc: Engineering team optimises punch patterns, tool selection, and material orientation to shorten cycle time and reduce waste.

steps.title: CAD/CAM Programming
steps.desc: Designs converted to precise CNC machine programs with accurate positional data and efficient turret utilisation.

steps.title: Punching & QC Inspection
steps.desc: Every batch dimension-verified by our QC team to ISO 9001 standards — hole geometry, spacing, and edge condition confirmed.

serviceBlocks.title: CNC Press Brake Bending
serviceBlocks.desc: Edge Steel KSA's CNC press brake stations form carbon steel, stainless steel, and aluminium to precise angles — from straightforward single-fold components to intricate multi-stage profiles requiring tight bend-sequence management. Optimised tooling selection and sequencing eliminate spring-back, keeping formed dimensions on specification across every production volume.

specs.label: GAUGE RANGE
specs.value: Light to heavy gauge · Long sections

steps.title: Drawing Review & Bend Sequence Plan
steps.desc: Material properties, gauge, and geometry assessed to determine the optimal bend order before any tooling is configured.

steps.title: Tool Setup & First-Off Trial
steps.desc: Tooling configured and first article measured against approved drawings before full-run production is released.

steps.title: Production Forming & Dimensional Check
steps.desc: Angles and formed dimensions QC-verified at regular intervals throughout the production run.

serviceBlocks.title: Plate & Section Rolling
serviceBlocks.desc: Edge Steel KSA's rolling operations convert flat plate and structural sections into cylinders, cones, rings, and compound curves for tanks, vessels, pipes, curved frames, and infrastructure steelwork. Precise radius control and experienced operators ensure smooth, consistent curvature — free of surface defects and ready for immediate welding or downstream fabrication without corrective rework.

steps.title: Radius Specification & Feasibility Review
steps.desc: Required radii, material thickness, and section dimensions assessed to confirm rolling feasibility and set optimal machine parameters.

steps.title: Rolling Operation
steps.desc: Plates or sections passed through controlled rolling machines to achieve the specified curvature without surface damage or material stress.

steps.title: Post-Roll Dimensional Inspection
steps.desc: Roundness, radius, and geometry compliance verified before components are cleared for welding or assembly.

serviceBlocks.title: Galvanizing Services
serviceBlocks.desc: Saudi Arabia's coastal climates and heavy industrial environments demand dependable zinc protection. Edge Steel KSA provides electro galvanizing for precision components requiring tight dimensional tolerances and smooth finishes, alongside hot-dip galvanizing for structural steel, frames, handrails, and outdoor infrastructure — where enduring corrosion resistance and minimal maintenance over the service life are the priority.

steps.title: Surface Cleaning & Preparation
steps.desc: Components degreased, pickled, and flux-treated to ensure complete zinc adhesion and coating integrity across all surface areas.

steps.title: Galvanizing Method Application
steps.desc: EG or HDG applied based on service environment, component geometry, and performance specification requirements.

steps.title: Coating Thickness Verification
steps.desc: Zinc coating thickness measured and documented by QC engineering team; components released with full traceability records.

serviceBlocks.title: Industrial Painting & Coating
serviceBlocks.desc: A correctly specified and applied coating system determines how long fabricated steel performs in service. Edge Steel KSA delivers high-performance epoxy coating systems and airless spray painting for structural assemblies, industrial equipment, enclosures, and outdoor components — applying controlled film thickness through certified processes that guard against corrosion, chemical attack, and mechanical wear across the full service lifecycle.

steps.title: Surface Preparation
steps.desc: Degreasing, cleaning, and mechanical preparation carried out to the required standard — ensuring optimal adhesion and eliminating premature coating failure.

steps.title: Coating System Selection
steps.desc: Epoxy or airless spray system matched to component service environment, exposure class, and client specification.

steps.title: Application & Finish Verification
steps.desc: Coatings applied by experienced operators; dry film thickness, adhesion, and finish quality verified and documented before release.

steps.title: Enquiry & File Review
steps.desc: Submit drawings or project scope. Engineers review files and respond within 24 hours.

steps.title: Quotation & DFM
steps.desc: Detailed cost estimate issued with DFM feedback, material options, and lead time.

steps.title: Production Schedule
steps.desc: Manufacturing schedule confirmed with hold-point plan and QC inspection milestones.

steps.title: Fabrication & Forming
steps.desc: Production executed with progress updates at key milestones throughout manufacturing.

steps.title: Final Inspection
steps.desc: Dimensional checks, coating thickness, and surface condition — all documented.

steps.title: Delivery & Records
steps.desc: Components despatched with dimensional reports, material traceability, and coating records.

testimonials.quote: Edge Steel KSA produced over 500 precision laser-cut panels for our industrial facility expansion in Jubail — every component within tolerance, with a hot-dip galvanized finish that sailed through third-party inspection on the first pass. Their integrated cutting-to-coating workflow eliminated weeks of vendor coordination from our programme.
testimonials.name: Daoud Mansouri
testimonials.role: Procurement Manager, Tier 1 Industrial Contractor — Eastern Province, KSA

testimonials.quote: The CNC bending quality on our structural enclosure assemblies was consistently excellent — every angle matched the drawing, every time. The hot-dip galvanizing was applied to spec and fully documented. Edge Steel have become our preferred fabrication partner in the Kingdom.
testimonials.name: Khalid Al-Amin
testimonials.role: Engineering Director, Industrial Equipment Manufacturer — Riyadh, KSA

cta.label: GET STARTED TODAY
cta.desc: Send us your drawings or outline your scope — our engineering team will respond within one business day with a technical review and competitive quotation.

hero.sub: Stock structural material and purpose-built formwork systems fabricated for Saudi Arabia's construction industry — or engineered to your exact project requirements. Every product is backed by certified material documentation and full QC traceability.

featured.title: ESK-FW100 Modular Column Formwork System
featured.desc: Shop-fabricated modular column moulds constructed from heavy-gauge structural steel plate with welded stiffener frames and precision-ground internal surfaces. Maintains accurate cross-section geometry and a smooth concrete finish across hundreds of casting cycles. Supplied in square, rectangular, and fully bespoke profiles to match your construction programme.

products.title: Hot-Rolled L-Sections & Angle Stock
products.desc: Equal and unequal leg structural angles produced to ASTM A36 and A572 Grade 50. Available saw-cut or shear-cut to specified lengths, with punched or drilled connection holes on request. Commonly used in bracing systems, secondary framing, and equipment support structures across Saudi Arabia.

products.title: Carbon Steel Flat Plate & Sheet
products.desc: Hot-rolled and cold-rolled carbon steel plate across commercial and structural grades. Surface options include standard mill scale, pickled-and-oiled, and cold-reduced finishes. Blanks supplied cut to net size or sheared to width, ready for immediate downstream fabrication.

products.title: Column & Pier Concrete Moulds
products.desc: Precision-built steel column formwork designed for consistent reuse without geometric drift. Reinforced closure panels, bolt-down locking systems, and factory-set chamfer fillets — fabricated to approved shop drawings and verified by pre-shipment trial assembly for reliable site performance.

products.title: Structural Beam Casting Forms
products.desc: Robust steel casting forms for rectangular, T-beam, and inverted-beam profiles. Adjustable end platens, integrated lifting provisions, and smooth vibration-optimised inner faces minimise concrete adhesion and reduce post-cast finishing effort on high-throughput precast yards.

products.title: Roadway & Infrastructure Barrier Moulds
products.desc: Engineered barrier formwork built for road safety structures, highway median dividers, and urban separation barriers. Hinged or detachable stripping panels accelerate cycle times on volume casting sites. Fully tailored to your specified barrier geometry, height, and reinforcement arrangement.

custom.label: CUSTOM FABRICATION
custom.desc: If your project needs something not in our catalogue, our engineering team will take your sketch, DXF, or verbal brief and turn it into a production-ready fabrication — complete with full traceability and QC documentation.

features.text: Submit DXF files, PDF drawings, or a sketch — our team handles the engineering and production.
Every product ships with mill certificates, weld records, and a dimensional QC report.
Packed, labelled, and delivered to your site anywhere in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

cta.heading: Need a Quote on Any Product?
cta.sub: Upload your drawings or describe what you need — response within 2 hours.

hero.sub: From a single Riyadh workshop to a full-spectrum industrial partner trusted by government ministries, defence entities, and Saudi Arabia's most ambitious developers — our growth is measured not in years, but in projects delivered.

story.label: Our Story
story.p1: Edge Steel KSA was established in 2020 with a clear mandate: close the gap between the demand for precision steel fabrication and the standard of delivery Saudi Arabia's industrial sector genuinely deserved. What began as a structural fabrication operation has since evolved into a fully integrated industrial solutions provider — managing everything from CNC fiber laser cutting to heavy equipment mobilisation, material supply, and skilled manpower deployment.
story.p2: Over five years of continuous operation, we have completed more than 500 projects for clients spanning national defence, energy infrastructure, hospitality, and commercial development. Our work is visible in the structural frameworks of commercial towers, the precision architectural screens defining civic façades, and the rental equipment fleets that keep major construction sites running on schedule.
story.p3: SCA certified, VAT registered, and SME accredited — these are not just credentials. They represent our commitment to governance, compliance, and the exacting standards that our government and enterprise clients require without compromise.

values.label: Core Values
values.sub: Four operating principles that govern every fabrication decision, every delivery commitment, and every client relationship.

valueItems.title: Precision
valueItems.desc: From our CNC fiber laser units achieving ±0.1mm cutting accuracy to structural assemblies governed by exact weld specifications — tolerance is not a target, it is the standard we begin with.

valueItems.title: Partnership
valueItems.desc: We engage as an extension of your project team — understanding your programme schedule, technical constraints, and quality requirements before a single component enters production.

valueItems.title: Speed
valueItems.desc: In-house fabrication, laser cutting, and equipment logistics under one roof eliminates the delays that multi-vendor supply chains create. Your programme timeline drives our production schedule.

valueItems.title: Excellence
valueItems.desc: SCA certification, continuous capital investment in technology, and a leadership team with two decades of Saudi industrial experience define what we consider our baseline. Not a goal — a minimum.

milestoneItems.title: Founded
milestoneItems.desc: Edge Steel KSA launched in Riyadh, combining structural fabrication expertise with a precision-first delivery model for industrial and construction clients across the Kingdom.

milestoneItems.title: SCA Certification
milestoneItems.desc: Achieved Saudi Contractors Authority certification — qualifying Edge Steel KSA for government-tier and defence-sector contract participation and reinforcing our compliance framework.

milestoneItems.title: Laser Division
milestoneItems.desc: Commissioned a dedicated CNC fiber laser division, extending our in-house capabilities to precision architectural panels, decorative façade screens, and tolerance-critical flat components.

milestoneItems.title: 500+ Projects
milestoneItems.desc: Crossed the 500-project threshold, confirming our standing as a trusted fabrication partner across structural, architectural, and industrial applications throughout Saudi Arabia.

milestoneItems.title: Fleet Expansion
milestoneItems.desc: Significantly scaled our equipment rental fleet — integrating generators, excavators, cranes, forklifts, and welding machines — to support full-service site operations for major contractors.

clients.label: Our Clients
clients.desc: From national defence and energy infrastructure to flagship hospitality and commercial developments, our client portfolio reflects the confidence placed in Edge Steel KSA by the industries shaping the Kingdom's future.

team.label: The Team
team.sub: Our leadership combines deep structural engineering capability and precision fabrication expertise with two decades of hands-on experience across Saudi Arabia's most demanding construction and industrial programmes.

teamMembers.name: Azhar Ali
teamMembers.desc: With more than 15 years embedded in Saudi Arabia's industrial construction sector, Azhar founded Edge Steel KSA to set a new performance benchmark in fabrication quality and project delivery. He operates with a hands-on approach — directly engaged in commercial strategy, major client relationships, and the technical decisions that determine outcomes on every large-scale programme.

teamMembers.name: Engineering Operations
teamMembers.desc: A certified welding supervisor with extensive international shop floor experience, our fabrication lead governs production scheduling, quality assurance, and all non-destructive testing and dimensional verification processes. Every component that leaves our facility meets specification — no exceptions, no compromises.

teamMembers.name: Projects & Site
teamMembers.desc: The direct interface between our production floor and active construction sites across the Kingdom. Our delivery lead manages multi-project scheduling, equipment mobilisation, on-site supervision, and logistics coordination — making certain that programme commitments are met, not renegotiated.

cta.label: Work With Us
cta.desc: Share your requirements with our engineering team and receive a technical review, material proposal, and competitive quotation — all within one business day.
